Farm Life — 3D model assets
============================

All models are low-poly, in the Quaternius CC0 studio style, cherry-picked from
the Quaternius asset family (crops, animated farm animals, farm buildings). Only
the specific models the game uses are shipped here (not whole packs).

CROPS  (public/models/crops/)  — Quaternius "Ultimate Crops" family, CC0
  turnip.glb      Quaternius "Turnip"            https://poly.pizza/m/taMEmsQCye  (exact)
  potato.glb      Quaternius "Plant"             https://poly.pizza/m/s0joFFrQoy  (leafy bush ≈ potato plant)
  corn.glb        Quaternius "Corn"              https://poly.pizza/m/IhhB7kGaAQ  (exact)
  pumpkin.glb     Quaternius "Pumpkin"           https://poly.pizza/m/bvLvqnU1jX  (exact)
  strawberry.glb  Quaternius "Small Plant"       https://poly.pizza/m/MZdeiQApSb  (small leafy plant ≈ strawberry)
  carrot.glb      Quaternius "Carrot"            https://poly.pizza/m/l4YmYv8hFK  (exact)
  tomato.glb      Quaternius "Tomato"            https://poly.pizza/m/ByggGxctjw  (fruit ≈ tomato plant)
  sunflower.glb   Quaternius "Flowers"           https://poly.pizza/m/NBUxHir6FJ  (flower cluster ≈ sunflower)

CHARACTER  (public/models/character/)  — Quaternius "Ultimate Modular Men Pack" / rig
           shared with the "Ultimate Animated Character Pack", CC0
  farmer.glb      Quaternius "Farmer"           https://poly.pizza/m/7pn3R6hPvE  (exact)
                  The PLAYER + all remote avatars. Fully rigged 62-bone humanoid
                  (CharacterArmature) with 24 embedded animation clips. The game
                  uses: Idle · Walk · Run (locomotion crossfade) · Sword_Slash
                  (mapped to the hoe swing) · Interact (plant / harvest scoop /
                  pet). The watering-can POUR, the harvest HOLD-UP beat, the REFILL
                  dip, and the JUMP tuck/landing squash are layered PROCEDURALLY on
                  top of the mixer (no stock clip reads for them). Remote players
                  get a per-player shirt/outfit TINT (clothing materials multiplied
                  toward a deterministic colour; skin/eyes kept natural). Falls back
                  to the original procedural straw-hat farmer if the GLB fails to
                  load (offline/404) — never a blank avatar.

ANIMALS  (public/models/animals/)
  chicken.glb     Quaternius "Chicken" (ANIMATED, skeletal Idle/Walk/Jump)  CC0
                  https://poly.pizza/m/ineV9pU5VL
  goat.glb        "Goat" by Poly by Google       https://poly.pizza/m/d7dImmjtF8E
                  LICENSE: CC-BY 4.0 (Creative Commons Attribution) — see NOTE below.

BUILDINGS  (public/models/buildings/)  — Quaternius "Farm Buildings" pack, CC0
  (copied from assets/farmkart/props/, same CC0 Quaternius pack)
  barn.glb        Quaternius Barn        (= farm_barn.glb)
  shed.glb        Quaternius Small Barn  (= farm_small_barn.glb, used as the shed)
  silo.glb        Quaternius Silo        (= farm_silo.glb)
  farmhouse.glb   Quaternius Silo House  (= farm_silo_house.glb, used as the farmhouse)

Distributed via poly.pizza (https://poly.pizza), a CC0/CC-BY 3D model host.

NOTE on goat.glb (the one non-CC0 asset):
  No CC0 goat exists in the Quaternius family (the Quaternius CC0 animated
  farm animals are cow/sheep/chicken/pig — no goat), and every goat on
  poly.pizza is either CC-BY or static+textured. Since the farm's animals are
  named goats (🐐 Clover / Buttons — a goat farm is the game's identity), the
  goat model is kept as an actual goat: "Goat" by Poly by Google, licensed
  CC-BY 4.0. ATTRIBUTION REQUIRED: "Goat by Poly by Google, CC-BY 4.0"
  (https://poly.pizza/m/d7dImmjtF8E). It is static (no rig) and is animated
  procedurally in-game (bob / walk / hop). The chicken carries the full
  skeletal AnimationMixer pipeline.
